title: Diminished Apotheosis
description: A data pack for balancing gems, affixes, rarities, boss loot, and affix loot entries.
body:
## Description

**Diminished Apotheosis** is a datapack that rebalances [Apotheosis](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apotheosis) and [Apotheotic Additions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apotheotic-additions) by reducing their overpowered values to create a more balanced gameplay experience.

### Balance Changes

- **Apotheosis**: All values reduced by **80%** (multiplied by 0.2)
- **Apotheotic Additions**: All values reduced by **60-70%** (multiplied by 0.16-0.4)

## What's Included

This datapack modifies:

### Affixes
- ✅ Armor affixes (attribute, damage reduction, mob effects)
- ✅ Weapon affixes (sword, heavy weapon, ranged, breaker)
- ✅ Shield affixes
- ✅ Special bonuses

### Gems
- ✅ Core gems (brawlers, guardian, lunar, solar, warlord, etc.)
- ✅ Dimension-specific gems (earth, royalty, blood_lord, inferno, endersurge, mageslayer)
- ✅ Twilight Forest gems (forest, queen)

### Other
- ✅ Boss spawning parameters
- ✅ Affix loot entries (quality and rarity adjusted)
- ✅ Rarity configurations
- ✅ Wandering Trader trades

## Installation

1. Download the datapack
2. Place it in your world's `datapacks` folder:
   - Singleplayer: `.minecraft/saves/<world_name>/datapacks/`
   - Server: `<server_folder>/<world_name>/datapacks/`
3. Reload datapacks with `/reload` command or restart the game/server

## Compatibility

- **Minecraft**: 1.20.1
- **Apotheosis**: 7.4.0+
- **Apotheotic Additions**: 1.3.0+
- **Twilight Forest**: Optional (Twilight content will work if installed)

## Example Changes

### Before (Apotheosis Original)
```json
"brawlers" (ancient gem):
- Attack Speed: +50% (0.50)
- Max Health: +10 hearts (10.0)
- Armor Pierce: +14 (14.0)

"blessed" affix (ancient):
- Max Health: +4-12 hearts
```

### After (Diminished Apotheosis)
```json
"brawlers" (ancient gem):
- Attack Speed: +10% (0.1) ← 80% reduction
- Max Health: +2 hearts (2.0) ← 80% reduction
- Armor Pierce: +2.8 (2.8) ← 80% reduction

"blessed" affix (ancient):
- Max Health: +0.8-2.4 hearts ← 80% reduction
```

### ApotheoticAdditions Changes
```json
"artifact_armor" affix (artifact rarity):
- Before: +10-20 armor
- After: +1.6-5.6 armor ← ~60-70% reduction
```

## Why Use This Datapack?

- **Balanced Progression**: Apotheosis items won't trivialize content
- **Fair PvP**: No more one-shot kills with overpowered gear
- **Server-Friendly**: Reduces power creep in multiplayer environments
- **Mod Compatibility**: Works better alongside other content mods
- **Vanilla-Plus Feel**: Maintains Minecraft's core balance philosophy

## FAQ

**Q: Does this work with existing Apotheosis items?**
A: Yes! New values apply immediately to existing items.

**Q: Can I adjust the reduction percentage?**
A: Yes, but you'll need to edit the JSON files manually. 

**Q: Will this work with future Apotheosis updates?**
A: It should work as long as Apotheosis maintains the same JSON structure. May need updates for new content.

**Q: Does this affect Apotheosis enchantments or spawners?**
A: No, this datapack only modifies Adventure module content (affixes, gems, loot).

## Credits

Created with care after extensive testing and balancing.

## License

This datapack is released under the MIT License. Feel free to use it in modpacks or modify for personal use.

## Support

Report issues or suggest improvements at [GitHub Issues (No link now)](https://github.com/ringoway/diminished-apotheosis/issues)

---

**Enjoy a more balanced Apotheosis experience!**
